title: Observability & Monitoring
description: Built Honda's monitoring platform from scratch. Now I get alerts before users start complaining. Usually.

title: Data & Reporting
description: Turning raw data into dashboards stakeholders actually look at. A rare achievement, apparently.

title: Backend & APIs
description: Building services and integrations. Led API project with external developers.

title: Frontend
description: Building interfaces. More comfortable with this than I used to be.

title: Project & Process
description: Coordinating work, tracking changes, attending meetings about meetings. The usual.

title: DevOps & Infrastructure
description: Deployment, version control, and debugging why it works on my machine but not yours.

title: Testing & QA
description: Regression testing, API validation, bug confirmation. Finding problems before users do is surprisingly satisfying.

title: AI & LLM Tools
description: Exploring how to make AI more context-aware. Dissertation focus area.

title: Stakeholder & Vendor Work
description: First point of contact for IBM, AT&T, Bosch at Honda. Cross-team coordination.
